name: Andhra Parupu Podi
description: Authentic Andhra-style lentil podi. Perfect with hot rice and ghee. Keep refrigerated.

name: Thakali Thokku
description: Tangy tomato thokku made the traditional way. Goes well with idli, dosa and rice. Keep refrigerated.

description: Nellai-style sesame idli podi with a rich, nutty flavour. A bestseller. Keep refrigerated.

name: Vathal Kulambu
description: Traditional Vathal Kulambu with sun-dried vegetables and tamarind base. Heat and serve. Keep refrigerated.

name: Chicken Pickle
description: Spicy homemade chicken pickle with authentic masala. Keep refrigerated.

name: Fish Pickle
description: Tangy and spicy fish pickle made fresh at home. Keep refrigerated.

name: Prawn Pickle
description: Premium prawn pickle marinated in special spices. A true seafood lover's delight. Keep refrigerated.
